allow: Bash(node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const v=JSON.parse\(chunks.join\(''\)\); const f=v.filter\(x=>x.startsWith\('15.'\)\).slice\(-15\); console.log\(f.join\('\\n'\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const v=JSON.parse\(chunks.join\(''\)\); const f=v.filter\(x=>x.startsWith\('15.'\) && !x.includes\('canary'\) && !x.includes\('rc'\) && !x.includes\('beta'\)\).slice\(-15\); console.log\(f.join\('\\n'\)\); }\);")
